title: Retatrutide for the treatment of obesity, obstructive sleep apnoea and knee osteoarthritis: rationale and design of the TRIUMPH registrational clinical trials
study_design: phase 3 programme rationale and design paper
population: phase 3 programme populations with obesity and related conditions
key_results: Defines the planned registrational programme, endpoints, estimands and linked condition cohorts.
safety_findings: Design paper; no final efficacy or safety outcome interpretation.
limitations: Protocol and design evidence does not establish treatment effect.

provenance.verification_method: PMID, DOI and master NCT cross-check

investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
